title: The Problem with AI Agents No One is Talking About | Yutori, Abhishek Das
summary: Abhishek Das, co-founder of Yutori, argues that most AI agents fail due to compounding errors across multi-step workflows. He contends the agent industry has normalized unreliability and that shipping agents requiring first-try performance necessitates focus on reliability over raw performance metrics and taste-building practices like dogfooding.
